title: Virus Disease Problems Of Groundnut, Chickpea, And Pigeonpea In Asia
abstract: Important virus diseases affecting groundnut, chickpea and pigeonpea in Asia are described and management practices given. In some countries, important virus diseases of the three ICRISAT mandate crops are yet to be characterized. Several international agencies are currently helping regional and national programs in Asia to find solutions to virus disease problems. Such cooperation is vital for identification and management of virus diseases of grain legumes.
